problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
